page_content:
ENTM789 Field Experience in Pest Management (1-6 Credits) Involvement in practical problems of pest management in ﬁeld situations. The student will be assigned to a problem area for intensive experience, usually during the summer. A ﬁnal written report is required for each assignment. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

ENTM798 Topic Seminar (1 Credit) Discussion and presentation of current research and literature. Prerequisite: Permission of CMNS-Entomology department.
